use_cases: Boolean toggle for enabling/disabling features in settings panels
Form validation requiring user agreement or consent acceptance
Multi-select filters in product listings or admin dashboards
Checkout flow terms and conditions acknowledgment
Interactive form controls for data entry interfaces
ai_summary: A minimalist checkbox component featuring a clean slate border with a blue checkmark SVG that appears on selection. Uses React peer states for checked/unchecked styling with Tailwind CSS. Perfect for forms, settings pages, and any interface requiring boolean input with straightforward visual feedback.
